query:
-- Check distinct costSource values to understand which ones indicate confirmed zero cost
SELECT costSource, COUNT(*) as count, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zero_cost_count
FROM services
WHERE status != 'terminated'
GROUP BY costSource
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:

SELECT costSource, COUNT(*) as count, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zero_cost_count
FROM services
WHERE status != 'terminated'

ORDER BY count DESC
